name: 80 MHz Programmable Dual Channel DDS Function / Arbitrary Waveform Generator
tagline: Dual-channel 80 MHz DDS with 300 MSa/s, 3.5-inch TFT, arbitrary waveforms, full modulation suite and USB — fully programmable for automated test.
description: The Vartech SGDA-80M is an 80 MHz dual-channel programmable DDS function and arbitrary waveform generator with 300 MSa/s sampling rate, 14-bit vertical resolution and a 3.5-inch 320×480 TFT colour LCD display. Sine output covers 1 nHz to 80 MHz; square to 30 MHz; triangle to 50 MHz; pulse and arbitrary to 30–50 MHz. Built-in waveforms include sine, square, pulse, ramp, CMOS, DC, partial sine, half/full wave, step waves, noise, exponential, logarithmic, multi-tone and Lorenz. Modulation modes cover AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK, PWM and BURST. A USB interface enables PC programming.
features: 80 MHz sine, 30 MHz square/pulse, 50 MHz triangle — dual independent channels
300 MSa/s sampling rate, 14-bit vertical resolution, 8K waveform points/channel
3.5-inch TFT colour LCD (320×480, 64K colours) — full parameter display
Full modulation suite — AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK, PWM, BURST
Frequency/amplitude/duty sweep — linear and logarithmic modes
Built-in frequency counter: 1 Hz ~ 100 MHz
USB interface for PC programming;  99 arbitrary waveform storage locations
Frequency accuracy ±5 ppm (0–50 °C);  frequency stability ±3 ppm/year

specs.label: Modulation
specs.value: AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK, PWM, BURST

specs.label: Sweep
specs.value: Frequency, Amplitude, Duty  (Linear / Logarithmic;  Increment / Decrement / Round trip);  Sweep time: 0.01 S ~ 640 S

specs.label: Frequency Counter
specs.value: 1 Hz ~ 100 MHz;  input amplitude 2 Vpp ~ 20 Vpp

specs.label: Storage
specs.value: 100 groups (waveform & setup);  99 arbitrary waveform storage locations

specs.label: Power Supply
specs.value: AC 85 ~ 264 V, 47 ~ 63 Hz;  Power consumption <30 W

name: 60 MHz Dual Channel DDS Function / Arbitrary Waveform Generator
tagline: 60 MHz DDS with 275 MSa/s, 2.8-inch colour screen, full modulation, VCO scanning and built-in frequency counter.
description: The Vartech SGDA-60M is a dual-channel DDS function and arbitrary waveform generator with 60 MHz sine output, 275 MSa/s sampling rate, 14-bit resolution and a 2.8-inch colour screen with silicone keys. Square and triangle output covers to 15 MHz. It outputs sine, square, pulse, triangle, ramp, CMOS, DC, half/full wave, step waves, exponential, Lorentz, multisonic, random noise, trapezoidal, sinker pulse and 99 user-defined arbitrary waveforms. Modulation modes include AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK and PWM; sweep covers frequency, amplitude and duty with VCO voltage-controlled scanning. A built-in frequency counter is included.
features: 60 MHz sine, 15 MHz square/triangle — dual independent channels
275 MSa/s, 14-bit resolution, 8K waveform points/channel
2.8-inch colour screen with silicone keys
AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK, PWM modulation + Burst
Frequency, amplitude and duty sweep with VCO voltage-controlled scanning
99 user-defined arbitrary waveforms
Built-in frequency counter

specs.label: Modulation
specs.value: AM, FM, PM, ASK, FSK, PSK, PWM;  Burst (Manual / CH2 / External AC / External DC)

specs.label: Sweep / VCO
specs.value: Frequency, Amplitude, Duty sweep;  VCO voltage-controlled scanning (0 V ~ 5 V)

name: 30 MHz Dual Channel DDS Function Generator
tagline: 30 MHz DDS with 266 MSa/s, 2.4-inch TFT, 60 arbitrary waveforms and built-in 100 MHz frequency counter.
description: The Vartech SGDA-30M is a dual-channel DDS function generator with 30 MHz sine output (25 MHz square and triangle, 6 MHz pulse/TTL/arbitrary), 266 MSa/s sampling rate and 14-bit resolution. A 2.4-inch TFT colour LCD displays all parameters. Waveforms include sine, square, pulse, triangle, CMOS, DC level, partial/half/full wave, staircase waves, noise, exponential, Lorenz and 60 built-in arbitrary waveforms. DC offset, linear/log sweep, burst and settings store/recall are provided. A multifunction frequency counter covers 1 Hz to 100 MHz. USB and TTL external interface. Power via DC 5V adaptor (220V AC supplied).
features: 30 MHz sine;  25 MHz square & triangle;  6 MHz pulse, TTL & arbitrary
Dual independent channels;  266 MSa/s, 14-bit resolution
60 built-in arbitrary waveforms
Frequency counter: 1 Hz ~ 100 MHz
DC offset, linear/log sweep, burst, store/recall
2.4-inch TFT LCD;  USB & TTL external interface

specs.label: Waveforms
specs.value: Sine, Square, Pulse, Triangle, CMOS, DC Level, Partial Sine, Half Wave, Full Wave, Positive Staircase, Anti-Ladder, Noise, Exponential Rise/Drop, Multisonic, Symplectic Pulse, Lorenz Pulse + 60 Arbitrary

specs.label: Other Functions
specs.value: DC Offset, Sweep (Lin / Log), Burst, Settings Store/Recall

specs.label: Power Supply
specs.value: DC 5V ±0.5V via adaptor  (adaptor for 220 V AC ±10%, 50 Hz provided)

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: Power adaptor, user manual, S/W, USB cable, BNC cables

name: 15 MHz Dual Channel DDS Function Generator
tagline: 15 MHz DDS with 266 MSa/s, 2.4-inch TFT and 60 arbitrary waveforms — same platform as the 30M at a more accessible frequency.
description: The Vartech SGDA-15M is a dual-channel DDS function generator sharing the proven SGDA-30M platform with 15 MHz sine, square and triangle output (6 MHz pulse/TTL/arbitrary), 266 MSa/s, 14-bit resolution and a 2.4-inch TFT LCD. All waveforms, 60 arbitrary waveforms, the 1 Hz to 100 MHz frequency counter, DC offset, sweep and burst functions are identical to the SGDA-30M.

name: 6 MHz Dual Channel DDS Function Generator
tagline: Entry-level 6 MHz DDS with 200 MSa/s, LCD display, USB interface and 60 MHz frequency counter — everything needed for basic bench signal generation.
description: The Vartech SGD-6M is a 6 MHz dual-channel DDS function generator with 200 MSa/s sampling rate, 12-bit resolution and a 16×2 backlit LCD display. It generates sine, square, triangle, sawtooth, TTL digital and 16 arbitrary waveforms. Amplitude is 5 mVpp to 20 Vpp with −20 dB attenuation. A multifunction frequency counter covers 0.1 Hz to 60 MHz. DC offset, linear/log sweep, burst, invert and settings store/recall are included. USB and TTL external interface. Powered by DC 5V adaptor (220V AC supplied).
features: 6 MHz output;  dual independent channels
200 MSa/s, 12-bit resolution
Sine, square, triangle, sawtooth, TTL digital and 16 arbitrary waveforms
Amplitude: 5 mVpp ~ 20 Vpp;  −20 dB attenuation
Frequency counter: 0.1 Hz ~ 60 MHz
DC offset, sweep (Lin/Log), burst, invert, store/recall
16×2 backlit LCD;  USB & TTL external interface
